message:
fix: improve visual quality — group opacity, label color, SVG diamond/frame

- Raise group boundary opacity from 0.4 to 0.6 (nearly invisible at 0.4)
- Arrow labels now use neutral dark color (#1e1e1e) instead of inheriting
  target node's stroke color (was producing rainbow-colored labels)
- TS SVG renderer now handles diamond (polygon) and frame (dashed rect)
- Adjust fromFile group detection threshold to match new opacity
